verdicts.corrected_value: Higgsfield is an AI image & video generation platform exposing a Minimal Connector Protocol (MCP) server and CLI for programmatic agent integrations.
verdicts.reasoning: The homepage describes Higgsfield as an AI-native creative suite focused on image and video generation, aligning with the recorded description.
The CLI page confirms that authentication is done via a Higgsfield account and session tokens, supporting the recorded value.
The pricing page indicates credit-based plans and the requirement of a credit card, but does not clarify if developers can self-register or obtain free trial credits, leaving the claim unsupported.
The MCP page indicates a narrow REST-like interface rather than a broad documented public REST/GraphQL API, contradicting the recorded value.
The main operational blocker is account provisioning/credits, which suggests that building is not feasible without prior account setup, contradicting the claim of being buildable today.
